dialogue_text: Unless I should chance to have the opportunity I have so long waited of battling with Tal Hajus.
source_excerpt: "The wild calots, possibly, or worse," he replied. "Unless I should chance to have the opportunity I have so long waited of battling with Tal Hajus."
